text.hr: Ako u raju nema cigara, ne idem tamo.
text.en: If there are no cigars in heaven, I shall not go.

text.hr: Pravilo mi je da nikad ne pušim više od jedne cigare odjednom.
text.en: I have made it a rule never to smoke more than one cigar at a time.

text.hr: Puno pijem, malo spavam i pušim cigaru za cigarom. Zato sam u dvjesto postotnoj formi.
text.en: I drink a great deal. I sleep a little, and I smoke cigar after cigar. That is why I am in two-hundred-percent form.

text.hr: Moje životno pravilo propisuje pušenje cigara i pijenje alkohola prije, poslije i, bude li potrebe, tijekom svih obroka te u razmacima između njih.
text.en: My rule of life prescribed as an absolutely sacred rite smoking cigars and also the drinking of alcohol before, after, and if need be during all meals and in the intervals between them.

text.hr: Žena je samo žena, ali dobra cigara — to je dim.
text.en: A woman is only a woman, but a good cigar is a Smoke.

text.hr: Svega previše je loše, ali previše dobrog viskija jedva je dovoljno.
text.en: Too much of anything is bad, but too much good whiskey is barely enough.

text.hr: Viski je tekuća sunčeva svjetlost.
text.en: Whisky is liquid sunshine.

text.hr: Ljubav pokreće svijet? Viski ga zavrti dvostruko brže.
text.en: Love makes the world go round? Whisky makes it go round twice as fast.

text.hr: Ništa tako ne smiruje duh kao rum i prava vjera.
text.en: There's naught, no doubt, so much the spirit calms as rum and true religion.

text.hr: Vino je jedna od najciviliziranijih stvari na svijetu.
text.en: Wine is one of the most civilized things in the world.

text.hr: Vino je sunčeva svjetlost koju drži voda.
text.en: Wine is sunlight, held together by water.

text.hr: Šampanjac: u pobjedi ga zaslužuješ, u porazu ga trebaš.
text.en: Champagne: in victory you deserve it, in defeat you need it.

text.hr: Cigara je savršen užitak: izvrsna je i ostavlja te nezadovoljnim. Što bi čovjek više htio?
text.en: A cigar is the perfect type of a perfect pleasure. It is exquisite, and it leaves one unsatisfied. What more can one want?

note.hr: parafraza iz 'Slike Doriana Graya' (original o cigareti)
note.en: paraphrased from 'Dorian Gray' (original about a cigarette)

text.hr: Pušenje cigare je poput zaljubljivanja: prvo te privuče oblik, ostaneš zbog okusa, a uvijek moraš paziti da plamen ne ugasne.
text.en: Smoking a cigar is like falling in love: first you are attracted to its shape, you stay for its flavour, and you must always take care that the flame never goes out.

text.hr: Nikad ne odgađaj za sutra cigaru koju možeš popušiti danas.
text.en: Never put off till tomorrow the cigar you can smoke today.

text.hr: Uz dobru cigaru, čovjek nikad nije sam.
text.en: With a good cigar, a man is never alone.

text.hr: Cigare se ne puše u žurbi — one su mjera slobodnog vremena.
text.en: Cigars are not smoked in a hurry — they are the measure of leisure.

note.en: paraphrased from 'The Story of a Good Cigar'

text.hr: Pijem šampanjac kad pobijedim, da proslavim; i pijem ga kad izgubim, da se utješim.
text.en: I drink champagne when I win, to celebrate; and I drink champagne when I lose, to console myself.

text.hr: Uvijek nosim viski sa sobom — za slučaj da vidim zmiju. Koju također nosim sa sobom.
text.en: I always take whisky along — in case I see a snake. Which I also carry.

text.hr: Civilizacija počinje destilacijom.
text.en: Civilization begins with distillation.

text.hr: Moj daiquiri u El Floriditi, moj mojito u La Bodeguiti.
text.en: My daiquiri in El Floridita, my mojito in La Bodeguita.

text.hr: Starost je pitanje uma nad materijom: ako ti ne smeta, nije važno. Uz cigaru i čašu — još manje.
text.en: Age is a case of mind over matter. If you don't mind, it doesn't matter — even less so with a cigar and a glass.

text.hr: Ponekad je cigara samo cigara.
text.en: Sometimes a cigar is just a cigar.

text.hr: Dobar viski treba piti s poštovanjem: polako, s vodom po želji i bez žurbe.
text.en: Good whisky deserves respect: slowly, with water if you wish, and never in a hurry.

facts.hr: »Anđeoski dio« (angel's share) je alkohol koji ispari iz bačve tijekom dozrijevanja — u Škotskoj oko 2 % godišnje, a u karipskoj klimi i preko 6 %.
facts.en: The angel's share is the alcohol that evaporates from the cask — about 2% a year in Scotland, but over 6% in the Caribbean climate.

facts.hr: Ring gauge (prstenasta mjera) cigare izražava se u 64-inama inča: Cuban Corona 45 znači promjer od 45/64 inča (~17,9 mm).
facts.en: A cigar's ring gauge is measured in 64ths of an inch: a Cuban Corona 45 is 45/64" (~17.9 mm) across.

facts.hr: Solera je sustav dozrijevanja u kojem se mlađa pića postupno miješaju sa starijima — broj na etiketi solere često označava najstariju, a ne prosječnu komponentu.
facts.en: A solera gradually blends younger spirit into older casks — the number on a solera label often refers to the oldest component, not the average.

facts.hr: Bourbon mora biti proizveden u SAD-u od najmanje 51 % kukuruza i dozrijevati u NOVIM, iznutra opaljenim hrastovim bačvama.
facts.en: Bourbon must be made in the USA from at least 51% corn and aged in NEW charred oak barrels.

facts.hr: Rabljene bourbon bačve ne bacaju se — u njima dozrijeva velik dio svjetskog scotcha i ruma.
facts.en: Used bourbon barrels are not thrown away — much of the world's scotch and rum matures in them.

facts.hr: Scotch mora dozrijevati najmanje 3 godine u hrastu u Škotskoj; dob na etiketi uvijek je NAJMLAĐI whisky u boci.
facts.en: Scotch must mature at least 3 years in oak in Scotland; the age on the label is always the YOUNGEST whisky in the bottle.

facts.hr: Treset (peat) daje dimljeni okus: mjeri se u ppm fenola — Octomore prelazi 100+ ppm, dok Laphroaig 10 ima oko 40 ppm.
facts.en: Peat gives the smoky taste, measured in phenol ppm — Octomore exceeds 100+ ppm, while Laphroaig 10 sits around 40 ppm.

facts.hr: Cognac VS znači najmanje 2 godine dozrijevanja, VSOP 4, a XO 10 godina najmlađe komponente.
facts.en: Cognac VS means at least 2 years of ageing, VSOP 4, and XO 10 for the youngest component.

facts.hr: Jamajčanski rumovi visokih estera dozrijevaju »funk« iz dundera — fermentirane mase koja se vraća u sljedeću fermentaciju.
facts.en: High-ester Jamaican rums get their funk from dunder — fermented residue returned to the next fermentation.

facts.hr: Rhum agricole peče se iz svježeg soka šećerne trske, a ne iz melase — zato miriše travnato i vegetalno.
facts.en: Rhum agricole is distilled from fresh cane juice, not molasses — hence its grassy, vegetal nose.

facts.hr: Navy strength (57 %) potječe iz doba kad su mornari provjeravali rum: barut natopljen rumom morao se i dalje zapaliti.
facts.en: Navy strength (57%) dates from sailors proofing rum: gunpowder soaked in it still had to ignite.

facts.hr: Maduro wrapper nije sorta duhana nego stupanj fermentacije — dulja i toplija fermentacija daje tamniji, slađi list.
facts.en: Maduro is not a tobacco variety but a fermentation level — longer, hotter fermentation yields a darker, sweeter leaf.

facts.hr: Puro je cigara kojoj wrapper, binder i filler dolaze iz iste zemlje — kubanske cigare su uvijek puros.
facts.en: A puro is a cigar whose wrapper, binder and filler come from one country — Cuban cigars are always puros.

facts.hr: Dijelovi cigare na španjolskom: capa (wrapper), capote (binder) i tripa (filler); majstor koji ih mota zove se torcedor.
facts.en: A cigar's parts in Spanish: capa (wrapper), capote (binder) and tripa (filler); the roller is a torcedor.

facts.hr: Vitola Churchill (7 x 47) dobila je ime po Winstonu Churchillu, koji je dnevno pušio 8–10 cigara.
facts.en: The Churchill vitola (7 x 47) is named after Winston Churchill, who smoked 8–10 cigars a day.

facts.hr: Humidor treba držati na 65–72 % relativne vlage i oko 20 °C — presuha cigara gori vruće i gorko.
facts.en: Keep a humidor at 65–72% relative humidity and about 20 °C — an over-dry cigar burns hot and bitter.

facts.hr: Cohiba je nastala 1966. kao privatna cigara Fidela Castra; u slobodnoj prodaji je tek od 1982.
facts.en: Cohiba began in 1966 as Fidel Castro's private cigar; it went on public sale only in 1982.

facts.hr: Zbog embarga iz 1962. kubanske cigare i danas su ilegalne u SAD-u — zato su procvale Dominikana, Nikaragva i Honduras.
facts.en: Due to the 1962 embargo Cuban cigars are still illegal in the USA — which is why the Dominican Republic, Nicaragua and Honduras flourished.

facts.hr: Nikaragvanski Estelí danas proizvodi više premium cigara nego cijela Kuba.
facts.en: Estelí in Nicaragua today produces more premium cigars than the whole of Cuba.

facts.hr: Connecticut Shade wrapper uzgaja se pod mrežama koje simuliraju oblake — zato je list tanak, svijetao i blag.
facts.en: Connecticut Shade wrapper is grown under cloth that mimics cloud cover — hence the thin, pale, mild leaf.

facts.hr: »Snaga« cigare (nikotin) i »tijelo« (punoća okusa) nisu isto: cigara može biti puna okusa, a blaga nikotinom.
facts.en: A cigar's strength (nicotine) and body (flavour fullness) differ: a cigar can be full-flavoured yet mild in nicotine.

facts.hr: EU pravilo: rum smije imati najviše 20 g/L dodanog šećera — iznad toga na etiketi mora pisati 'spirit drink'.
facts.en: EU rule: rum may carry at most 20 g/L added sugar — above that the label must read 'spirit drink'.

facts.hr: Konjaku su dopušteni šećer, karamel E150a i boisé (hrastova infuzija) do ukupno 4 % obskuracije — bez navođenja na etiketi.
facts.en: Cognac may contain sugar, E150a caramel and boisé (oak infusion) up to 4% obscuration — with no label disclosure.

facts.hr: Single malt znači: jedna destilerija + 100 % ječmeni slad — ne znači jedna bačva (to je single cask).
facts.en: Single malt means one distillery and 100% malted barley — not one cask (that's single cask).

facts.hr: Chill-filtracija uklanja masne kiseline da whisky ne zamuti na hladnom — mnogi puristi radije biraju nefiltrirane (NCF) boce.
facts.en: Chill filtration removes fatty acids so whisky won't haze when cold — many purists prefer non-chill-filtered (NCF) bottlings.

facts.hr: Mizunara je rijedak japanski hrast koji daje note sandalovine i tamjana — bačve su toliko porozne da se koriste tek nakon posebne obuke bačvara.
facts.en: Mizunara is a rare Japanese oak lending sandalwood and incense notes — the casks are so porous that coopering them is a craft of its own.

facts.hr: Tennessee whiskey (npr. Jack Daniel's) prije bačve prolazi kroz metar drvenog ugljena javora — Lincoln County proces.
facts.en: Tennessee whiskey (e.g. Jack Daniel's) trickles through sugar-maple charcoal before barrelling — the Lincoln County process.

facts.hr: Porto je fortificiran usred fermentacije: dodani destilat (77 %) zaustavi kvasce i sačuva prirodni šećer grožđa.
facts.en: Port is fortified mid-fermentation: added grape spirit (77%) stops the yeast and preserves the grape's natural sugar.

facts.hr: Ruby porto čuva voće i boju u velikim bačvama; tawny stari oksidativno u malima i poprima boju lješnjaka i note oraha.
facts.en: Ruby port keeps fruit and colour in large vats; tawny ages oxidatively in small casks, turning hazel with walnut notes.

facts.hr: Fino sherry stari ispod flora — sloja kvasca koji ga štiti od zraka; oloroso stari bez flora pa je tamniji i puniji.
facts.en: Fino sherry ages under flor — a yeast layer shielding it from air; oloroso ages without flor, darker and fuller.

facts.hr: Pedro Ximénez (PX) radi se od grožđa sušenog na suncu — najslađe vino na svijetu, i do 500 g/L šećera.
facts.en: Pedro Ximénez (PX) is made from sun-dried grapes — the world's sweetest wine, up to 500 g/L of sugar.

facts.hr: Kalifornijski zinfandel i talijanski primitivo genetski su ista sorta — hrvatski crljenak kaštelanski (tribidrag).
facts.en: California's zinfandel and Italy's primitivo are genetically the same variety — Croatia's crljenak kaštelanski (tribidrag).

facts.hr: Prošek nije fortificiran: slatkoću dobiva od prosušenog grožđa (passito metoda), tradicionalno u Dalmaciji.
facts.en: Prošek is not fortified: its sweetness comes from dried grapes (the passito method), a Dalmatian tradition.

facts.hr: Amarone nastaje od grožđa sušenog 3–4 mjeseca (appassimento) — zato ima 15+ % alkohola i note suhe višnje.
facts.en: Amarone is made from grapes dried for 3–4 months (appassimento) — hence 15%+ alcohol and dried-cherry notes.

facts.hr: London Dry nije zemljopisna oznaka nego metoda: sve arome moraju doći destilacijom, bez ičega dodanog poslije (osim vode).
facts.en: London Dry is a method, not a place: all flavour must come through distillation, with nothing added afterwards (except water).

facts.hr: Gin je pravno definiran jednim sastojkom: prevladavajućom aromom borovice (juniper).
facts.en: Gin is legally defined by one ingredient: a predominant juniper flavour.

facts.hr: Kolumbov posada donijela je duhan u Europu 1492.; riječ 'cigara' vjerojatno dolazi od majanske riječi 'sikar' — pušiti.
facts.en: Columbus's crew brought tobacco to Europe in 1492; 'cigar' likely stems from the Mayan 'sikar' — to smoke.

facts.hr: Grappa se peče iz komine — kožica i sjemenki preostalih nakon prešanja vina; odležana grappa smije imati karamel.
facts.en: Grappa is distilled from pomace — the skins and seeds left after pressing wine; aged grappa may contain caramel.

facts.hr: Armagnac se najčešće peče JEDNOM u kolonskom alambiku (52–60 %), pa je rustikalniji od dvostruko pečenog konjaka.
facts.en: Armagnac is usually distilled ONCE in a column alambic (52–60%), making it more rustic than twice-distilled cognac.

facts.hr: Kubanski duhan za najbolje wrappere raste u regiji Vuelta Abajo (Pinar del Río) — mikroklimi koju Kubanci zovu najboljom na svijetu.
facts.en: Cuba's finest wrapper tobacco grows in Vuelta Abajo (Pinar del Río) — a microclimate Cubans call the world's best.

facts.hr: Duhan za cigare fermentira u hrpama (pilónes) na 40–50 °C i po nekoliko mjeseci — bez toga bi bio oštar i neprikladan za pušenje.
facts.en: Cigar tobacco ferments in pilónes at 40–50 °C for months — without it the leaf would be harsh and unsmokable.

facts.hr: Boja pepela govori o tlu: bijeli pepeo znači tlo bogato magnezijem i kalcijem; čvrst pepeo znak je kvalitetno motane cigare.
facts.en: Ash colour reflects the soil: white ash means magnesium- and calcium-rich earth; firm ash signals a well-rolled cigar.

facts.hr: Foursquare (Barbados) destilerija Richarda Sealea globalni je predvodnik borbe za deklariranje aditiva u rumu.
facts.en: Richard Seale's Foursquare (Barbados) leads the global push for additive disclosure in rum.

facts.hr: Hampden Estate (Jamajka) objavljuje razinu estera na etiketi — od OWH (40–80) do DOK (do 1600 g/hL AA).
facts.en: Hampden Estate (Jamaica) prints ester marks on the label — from OWH (40–80) up to DOK (to 1,600 g/hL AA).

facts.hr: Cask strength znači da whisky nije razrijeđen nakon bačve — kap vode 'otvara' arome jer mijenja površinsku napetost.
facts.en: Cask strength means the whisky is not diluted after the cask — a drop of water 'opens' the aromas by changing surface tension.

facts.hr: NAS (No Age Statement) boce nemaju istaknutu dob — dob nije jedina mjera kvalitete, ali informacija jest vrijednost.
facts.en: NAS (No Age Statement) bottles show no age — age isn't the only measure of quality, but disclosure has value.

facts.hr: Figurado su cigare nepravilnog oblika (torpedo, belicoso, perfecto); parejo su ravne s ravnim krajem.
facts.en: Figurados are shaped cigars (torpedo, belicoso, perfecto); parejos are straight with a flat foot.

facts.hr: Cigaru pali dugim šibicama ili plinskim upaljačem bez mirisa — benzinski upaljači kvare okus prvim dimom.
facts.en: Light a cigar with long matches or an odourless gas lighter — petrol lighters taint the first draw.

facts.hr: Prstenovi (bands) na cigarama pojavili su se 1830-ih kod Gustava Bocka — navodno da bijele rukavice gospode ostanu čiste.
facts.en: Cigar bands appeared in the 1830s with Gustave Bock — allegedly so gentlemen's white gloves stayed clean.

facts.hr: Whisky se u boci više ne razvija: za razliku od vina, godina punjenja manje je važna od godina u bačvi.
facts.en: Whisky stops developing in the bottle: unlike wine, bottling year matters far less than years in cask.

q.hr: Koliko dodanog šećera rum smije imati po EU pravilima da bi se i dalje zvao 'rum'?
q.en: How much added sugar may rum contain under EU rules and still be called 'rum'?

why.hr: Uredba EU 2019/787: iznad 20 g/L proizvod se označava kao 'spirit drink'.
why.en: EU Regulation 2019/787: above 20 g/L the product is labelled 'spirit drink'.

q.hr: Što od navedenog whisky (EU/Scotch) SMIJE sadržavati?
q.en: Which of these may whisky (EU/Scotch) legally contain?

why.hr: Jedini dopušteni dodatak je karamel E150a za ujednačavanje boje (+ voda).
why.en: The only permitted additive is E150a caramel for colour consistency (plus water).

q.hr: Koliki je limit obskuracije (ukupnih dodataka) u konjaku?
q.en: What is the obscuration (total additives) limit in cognac?

why.hr: Šećer, E150a i boisé zajedno do 4 % obskuracije (~15 g/L), bez obveze na etiketi.
why.en: Sugar, E150a and boisé may total 4% obscuration (~15 g/L), with no labelling duty.

q.hr: Od čega se peče rhum agricole?
q.en: What is rhum agricole distilled from?

why.hr: Zato agricole miriše travnato i vegetalno; većina ostalih rumova peče se iz melase.
why.en: That's why agricole smells grassy and vegetal; most other rum is molasses-based.

q.hr: Što ring gauge 45 znači kod cigare Cuban Corona?
q.en: What does ring gauge 45 mean on a Cuban Corona?

why.hr: Ring gauge se mjeri u 64-inama inča — 45/64" je oko 17,9 mm.
why.en: Ring gauge is measured in 64ths of an inch — 45/64" is about 17.9 mm.

q.hr: Maduro wrapper je…
q.en: A maduro wrapper is…

why.hr: Maduro je stupanj fermentacije — daje tamniji, slađi list s notama kakaa.
why.en: Maduro is a fermentation level — a darker, sweeter leaf with cocoa notes.

q.hr: Bourbon mora sadržavati najmanje…
q.en: Bourbon must contain at least…

why.hr: Uz to: proizveden u SAD-u i dozrijevan u novim opaljenim hrastovim bačvama.
why.en: Plus: made in the USA and aged in new charred oak barrels.

q.hr: Koja je minimalna starost XO konjaka?
q.en: What is the minimum age of an XO cognac?

why.hr: XO = najmlađa komponenta min. 10 godina (od 2018.); VSOP je 4, VS 2.
why.en: XO = youngest component at least 10 years (since 2018); VSOP is 4, VS 2.

q.hr: Odakle jamajčanskim rumovima 'funk' (visoki esteri)?
q.en: Where does Jamaican rum's funk (high esters) come from?

a.en: From tropical fruit in the cask

why.hr: Dunder — fermentirani ostatak prethodne destilacije — potiče stvaranje estera.
why.en: Dunder — fermented residue of the previous run — drives ester creation.

q.hr: Navy strength za gin i rum označava oko…
q.en: Navy strength for gin and rum means about…

why.hr: Na 57 % barut natopljen pićem još se pali — tako je mornarica provjeravala robu.
why.en: At 57% gunpowder soaked in the spirit still ignites — the navy's proofing test.

q.hr: Single malt znači…
q.en: Single malt means…

why.hr: Jedna bačva je 'single cask'; single malt smije biti blend više bačvi iste destilerije.
why.en: One cask is 'single cask'; a single malt may blend many casks of one distillery.

q.hr: Dob na etiketi scotcha (npr. 12) odnosi se na…
q.en: The age on a scotch label (e.g. 12) refers to…

why.hr: Zakonski: sve u boci mora biti najmanje te dobi.
why.en: By law, everything in the bottle must be at least that old.

q.hr: Što je puro?
q.en: What is a puro?

a.hr: Cigara čiji svi listovi dolaze iz iste zemlje
a.en: A cigar whose leaves all come from one country
The strongest cigar in a line

why.hr: Kubanske cigare su uvijek puros; Opus X je slavni dominikanski puro.
why.en: Cuban cigars are always puros; Opus X is a famous Dominican puro.

q.hr: Kako se zove majstor koji mota cigare?
q.en: What is a cigar roller called?

why.hr: Torcedor; ligador je majstor koji slaže blend listova.
why.en: Torcedor; the ligador is the master who composes the leaf blend.

q.hr: U kojoj kubanskoj regiji raste najcjenjeniji duhan za wrapper?
q.en: Which Cuban region grows the most prized wrapper tobacco?

why.hr: Vuelta Abajo u provinciji Pinar del Río — mikroklima za capa listove.
why.en: Vuelta Abajo in Pinar del Río — the microclimate for capa leaves.

q.hr: Sherry fino stari…
q.en: Fino sherry ages…

why.hr: Flor štiti vino od zraka — zato je fino svijetao, suh i slan.
why.en: Flor shields the wine from air — hence fino is pale, dry and saline.

q.hr: Koje je najslađe vino na svijetu?
q.en: Which is the world's sweetest wine?

why.hr: PX od prosušenog grožđa doseže i 500 g/L šećera.
why.en: PX from sun-dried grapes can reach 500 g/L of sugar.

q.hr: Zinfandel i primitivo genetski su ista sorta kao…
q.en: Zinfandel and primitivo are genetically the same variety as…

why.hr: Crljenak (tribidrag) je otac plavca malog, a identičan zinfandelu/primitivu.
why.en: Crljenak (tribidrag) fathered plavac mali and is identical to zinfandel/primitivo.

q.hr: Kada se portu dodaje vinski destilat?
q.en: When is grape spirit added to port?

why.hr: Destilat zaustavi kvasce pa prirodni šećer grožđa ostane u vinu.
why.en: The spirit stops the yeast, so the grape's natural sugar stays in the wine.

q.hr: Prošek slatkoću dobiva od…
q.en: Prošek gets its sweetness from…

why.hr: Passito metoda — bez fortifikacije, za razliku od porta.
why.en: The passito method — no fortification, unlike port.

q.hr: London Dry gin je…
q.en: London Dry gin is…

a.hr: metoda: sve arome destilacijom, ništa dodano poslije
a.en: a method: all flavour by distillation, nothing added after

why.hr: Zemljopis nije bitan; poslije destilacije smije se dodati samo voda (šećer ≤0,1 g/L).
why.en: Geography is irrelevant; after distillation only water may be added (sugar ≤0.1 g/L).

q.hr: Prevladavajuća aroma koja pravno definira gin je…
q.en: The predominant flavour that legally defines gin is…

why.hr: Bez prevladavajuće borovice — nije gin.
why.en: No predominant juniper — not gin.

q.hr: Angel's share u tropima je otprilike…
q.en: The angel's share in the tropics is roughly…

why.hr: Zato tropski odležan rum od 12 godina 'nosi' kao puno stariji whisky.
why.en: That's why a 12-year tropical rum 'carries' like a much older whisky.

q.hr: Solera broj na etiketi (npr. 'Solera 23') najčešće označava…
q.en: A solera number (e.g. 'Solera 23') most often indicates…

a.en: the oldest component in the system

why.hr: Prosjek je često znatno mlađi — zato solere ne usporeduj s age-statement whiskyjem.
why.en: The average is usually far younger — don't compare soleras with age-statement whisky.

q.hr: Tko je predvodnik pokreta za deklariranje aditiva u rumu?
q.en: Who leads the push for additive disclosure in rum?

why.hr: Barbadoška Foursquare destilerija deklarira 'bez aditiva' i javno zagovara transparentnost.
why.en: Barbados's Foursquare declares 'no additives' and campaigns for transparency.

q.hr: Hampden Estate na etiketu stavlja oznake poput OWH i DOK — što označavaju?
q.en: Hampden Estate prints marks like OWH and DOK — what do they denote?

why.hr: Ester marke: OWH je 40–80, DOK do 1600 g/hL AA — što više, to 'funkier'.
why.en: Ester marks: OWH is 40–80, DOK up to 1,600 g/hL AA — the higher, the funkier.

q.hr: Tennessee whiskey se od bourbona razlikuje po…
q.en: Tennessee whiskey differs from bourbon by…

a.hr: Lincoln County procesu (filtracija kroz ugljen javora)

why.hr: Prije bačve destilat kapa kroz metar drvenog ugljena šećernog javora.
why.en: Before barrelling the spirit drips through sugar-maple charcoal.

q.hr: Koliko dugo scotch mora dozrijevati u hrastu?
q.en: How long must scotch mature in oak?

why.hr: Najmanje 3 godine u Škotskoj — inače se ne smije zvati scotch.
why.en: At least 3 years in Scotland — otherwise it cannot be called scotch.

q.hr: Cask strength whisky je…
q.en: Cask strength whisky is…

why.hr: Obično 55–65 %; kap vode otvara arome.
why.en: Typically 55–65%; a drop of water opens the aromas.

q.hr: Mizunara bačve dolaze iz…
q.en: Mizunara casks come from…

why.hr: Rijedak japanski hrast — note sandalovine i tamjana.
why.en: A rare Japanese oak — sandalwood and incense notes.

q.hr: Chill-filtracija se radi da…
q.en: Chill filtration is done so that…

why.hr: Uklanja masne kiseline; NCF boce puristi često preferiraju radi teksture.
why.en: It strips fatty acids; purists often prefer NCF bottlings for texture.

q.hr: Fenoli u tresetnom whiskyju mjere se u…
q.en: Phenols in peated whisky are measured in…

why.hr: Laphroaig 10 ~40 ppm; Octomore prelazi 100+ ppm.
why.en: Laphroaig 10 ~40 ppm; Octomore exceeds 100+ ppm.

q.hr: Armagnac se tradicionalno destilira…
q.en: Armagnac is traditionally distilled…

why.hr: Jedna destilacija na 52–60 % čuva više kongenera — rustikalniji profil od konjaka.
why.en: A single run at 52–60% keeps more congeners — a more rustic profile than cognac.

q.hr: Grappa se peče iz…
q.en: Grappa is distilled from…

why.hr: Destilat od vina bio bi brandy/vinjak; grappa je destilat komine.
why.en: Distilled wine would be brandy; grappa is pomace spirit.

q.hr: Amarone se radi od grožđa koje je…
q.en: Amarone is made from grapes that are…

why.hr: Appassimento koncentrira šećer — zato 15+ % alkohola i note suhe višnje.
why.en: Appassimento concentrates sugar — hence 15%+ alcohol and dried-cherry notes.

q.hr: Tawny porto boju lješnjaka dobiva…
q.en: Tawny port gets its hazel colour…

a.en: from oxidative ageing in small casks

why.hr: Ruby čuva voće u velikim bačvama; tawny polako oksidira u malima.
why.en: Ruby keeps fruit in large vats; tawny slowly oxidises in small casks.

q.hr: Koja vitola nosi ime britanskog premijera?
q.en: Which vitola is named after a British prime minister?

why.hr: Churchill (7 x 47) — po Winstonu, koji je pušio 8–10 cigara dnevno.
why.en: Churchill (7 x 47) — after Winston, who smoked 8–10 cigars a day.

q.hr: Idealna relativna vlaga u humidoru je…
q.en: The ideal relative humidity in a humidor is…

why.hr: Presuho gori vruće i gorko; prevlažno pljesnivi i teško vuče.
why.en: Too dry burns hot and bitter; too damp moulds and draws poorly.

q.hr: Cohiba je nastala kao…
q.en: Cohiba began as…

a.en: an export brand for the USA

why.hr: Od 1966. samo za državni protokol; u prodaji tek od 1982.
why.en: From 1966 reserved for state protocol; on sale only from 1982.

q.hr: Zašto su Dominikana, Honduras i Nikaragva postale velesile premium cigara?
q.en: Why did the Dominican Republic, Honduras and Nicaragua become premium-cigar powers?

why.hr: Kubanski majstori i sjeme raselili su se nakon revolucije i embarga.
why.en: Cuban masters and seed dispersed after the revolution and embargo.

q.hr: Connecticut Shade duhan raste…
q.en: Connecticut Shade tobacco grows…

why.hr: Sjena daje tanak, svijetao, blag list — klasika za blage cigare.
why.en: Shade yields a thin, pale, mild leaf — the classic for gentle cigars.

q.hr: Razlika između 'snage' i 'tijela' cigare?
q.en: The difference between a cigar's strength and body?

why.hr: Cigara može biti puna okusa, a blaga nikotinom — i obrnuto.
why.en: A cigar can be full-flavoured yet mild in nicotine — and vice versa.

q.hr: Kako se zovu tri dijela cigare (španjolski)?
q.en: What are a cigar's three parts called (Spanish)?

why.hr: Wrapper/binder/filler. (Ligero, seco i volado su pozicije lista na biljci.)
why.en: Wrapper/binder/filler. (Ligero, seco and volado are leaf positions on the plant.)

q.hr: Figurado je…
q.en: A figurado is…

why.hr: Ravne cigare s ravnim krajem zovu se parejo.
why.en: Straight cigars with a flat foot are called parejos.

q.hr: Riječ 'cigara' vjerojatno dolazi od…
q.en: The word 'cigar' likely comes from…

why.hr: Duhan je u Europu stigao s Kolumbovim posadama 1492.
why.en: Tobacco reached Europe with Columbus's crews in 1492.

q.hr: Prstenovi (bands) na cigarama uvedeni su navodno da…
q.en: Cigar bands were allegedly introduced so that…

why.hr: Gustave Bock, 1830-e — i protiv krivotvorina.
why.en: Gustave Bock, 1830s — and to fight counterfeits.

q.hr: Bijeli, čvrst pepeo cigare znak je…
q.en: White, firm cigar ash signals…

a.hr: tla bogatog mineralima i dobre izrade

why.hr: Magnezij i kalcij u tlu izbjeljuju pepeo; čvrstoća svjedoči o motanju.
why.en: Soil magnesium and calcium whiten ash; firmness attests to the roll.

q.hr: Kojim se upaljačem NE preporučuje paliti cigaru?
q.en: Which lighter is NOT recommended for a cigar?

why.hr: Benzin ostavlja miris koji pokvari prve dimove.
why.en: Petrol leaves an odour that taints the first draws.

q.hr: Whisky u zatvorenoj boci…
q.en: Whisky in a sealed bottle…

why.hr: Za razliku od vina, razvoj staje izvan bačve.
why.en: Unlike wine, development stops outside the cask.

q.hr: NAS na whisky boci znači…
q.en: NAS on a whisky bottle means…

why.hr: Dob nije jedina mjera kvalitete, ali deklaracija jest informacija.
why.en: Age isn't the only quality measure, but disclosure is information.

q.hr: Estelí, glavni grad premium cigara izvan Kube, nalazi se u…
q.en: Estelí, the premium-cigar capital outside Cuba, is in…

why.hr: Vulkansko tlo Estelíja daje punije, začinske cigare (Padrón, Oliva, Drew Estate…).
why.en: Estelí's volcanic soil gives fuller, spicier cigars (Padrón, Oliva, Drew Estate…).

q.hr: Don Papa rum dolazi s…
q.en: Don Papa rum comes from…

why.hr: Neovisna mjerenja pokazuju ~29 g/L dodanog šećera — u EU 'spirit drink'.
why.en: Independent tests show ~29 g/L added sugar — a 'spirit drink' in the EU.

q.hr: Koja HR sorta raste na položajima Dingač i Postup?
q.en: Which Croatian variety grows on the Dingač and Postup slopes?

why.hr: Strmi pelješki položaji uz more — najpoznatija hrvatska crna vina.
why.en: Steep seaside Pelješac sites — Croatia's most famous reds.

q.hr: Kubanske cigare u SAD-u su…
q.en: Cuban cigars in the USA are…

why.hr: Embargo traje od 1962. godine.
why.en: The embargo has run since 1962.

q.hr: Boisé, dopušten u konjaku, je…
q.en: Boisé, permitted in cognac, is…

why.hr: Daje dojam duljeg dozrijevanja; ulazi u limit od 4 % obskuracije.
why.en: It mimics longer ageing; it counts toward the 4% obscuration cap.
